overview: Super App is a full-stack mobile-first web application with Shop, Delivery, and Service categories. Features include product browsing, cart management, cart checkout with order placement, order history tracking, service booking, and a full Admin Panel with featured items management, user roles, and order approvals.
features: Product browsing with cart and cart checkout flow
Order placement that appears immediately in order history
Email/password login and signup for regular users
Admin panel with dashboard, order management, product/service lists, featured items, and role approvals
Internet Identity login for admin access
